mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_attachments (uploader_id, file_url, original_file_name, file_type, file_size, created_at) VALUES (#{uploaderId}, #{fileUrl}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, message_id, uploader_id, file_url, original_file_name, file_type, file_size, created_at FROM chat_attachments WHERE message_id IN
#{messageId}
